title: [codereview] hkdf_expand counter increment safety
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/hkdf.c:100: uint16_t counter used with post-increment in buf[buf_len++] = (uint8_t)counter++. Although bounds check prevents >255 iterations, post-increment means counter reaches 256. Consider pre-increment or uint8_t with explicit comment (but no comments allowed). Also, add static_assert or check for counter overflow. P4 style/defensive. Tagged codereview. Depends on project-LICHEN-7yu8
close_reason: Fixed as part of hkdf cleanup above
